name: Hideable.ShouldBeHiddenFlags
summary: The flag for keeping track if object should be hidden.

enum_values.name: ShouldNotBeHidden
enum_values.summary: Should not be hidden, default value.

enum_values.name: HideFromDrawingView
enum_values.summary: To be hidden from drawing view.

enum_values.name: ShowInDrawingView
enum_values.summary: To be shown in drawing view.
